reviews.comment:
Los baños son impecables, el dispenser de agua caliente es gratis. Pero los plateros dicen estar a full y no limpian vidrios.

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are spotless, and the hot water dispenser is free. But the silversmiths say they're swamped and don't clean windows.

reviews.comment:
Necesario punto de carga, fue rápido y nos atendieron bien. Cargan puntos con la tarjeta o el documento

(Translated by Google)
A necessary charging point; it was quick and the service was good. They charge points with a card or ID.

reviews.comment:
Las habitaciones estan deterioradas, sucias las alfombras. La renovacion ha sido insuficiente. El servicio lo suma el trato cordial del personal. La ubicacion es buena, sobre la ruta. Que te hagan una factura A es un milagro y si la hacen te generan una nota de credito.

(Translated by Google)
The rooms are run-down, the carpets are dirty. The renovation has been insufficient. The only redeeming feature is the friendly service from the staff. The location is good, right on the main road. Getting an invoice is a miracle, and if they do, they'll give you a credit note.

reviewReply.comment:
Buenas noches . No se refiere a nuestro motel . No tenemos alfombras en nuestro establecimientos.

Saludos

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1988985900989530919/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURCcl9LUUpBEAE

reviews.comment:
